logs.message: ALERT: Earthquake detected in Sarawak, Malaysia!
COMMANDER: Deploying regional KaijuGuard response fleet to Sarawak epicenter.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-SAR-1 responding to tactical alert in Sarawak.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-SAR-2 responding to tactical alert in Sarawak.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-SAR-3 responding to tactical alert in Sarawak.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-SAR-4 responding to tactical alert in Sarawak.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-SAR-5 responding to tactical alert in Sarawak.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-SAR-6 responding to tactical alert in Sarawak.
COMMANDER: Swarm-intelligence algorithms managing 6 local units.

summary.text: All active drones have been assigned their missions. DR-MA-KUA-1 has been dispatched to coordinates (10, 20) to conduct a thermal scan and drop medical supplies. It has also been tasked with deploying a mesh network and will proceed to (15, 25) to analyze structural integrity.

logs.message: [COMMAND] detect_survivors assigned to DR-MA-KUA-1 queue. Will execute upon arrival.
[COMMAND] drop_payload assigned to DR-MA-KUA-1 queue. Will execute upon arrival.
[COMMAND] deploy_mesh assigned to DR-MA-KUA-1 queue. Will execute upon arrival.
[COMMAND] structural_scan assigned to DR-MA-KUA-1 queue. Will execute upon arrival.
